steps.title: Set equations equal and simplify
steps.content:
At an intersection point, both equations yield the same $y$-value. Set them equal:
$$x^2 + 16x + 8 = x + 8$$
Subtract $x + 8$ from both sides:
$$x^2 + 15x = 0$$

steps.title: Factor and identify the answer
steps.content: Factor out $x$: $$x(x + 15) = 0$$ This gives $x = 0$ or $x = -15$. Since $-15$ is one of the available choices, that matches Choice A — $-15$.
